title: Opening for Software Engineer at Urban Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Urban Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Company Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
